text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After visiting a shrine with Super Creek...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sigh...
choice_data_list: It's not often you sigh like that.
It's not often you sigh like that.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry. I just don't quite feel like myself
today...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But the air is so fresh here and I really feel like I
can relax.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, back when we were praying
at the shrine...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Did you wish for anything?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, about me? What exactly did you wish
for?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If it's something I can do, then don't hesitate to
ask.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh... or is it perhaps something that's difficult to
ask me directly?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Guessing what it is might be fun!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You want me to hold you in my arms, right?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh, really?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, just kidding!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There's only one thing that's ever on your mind,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. I'm sure training will go as well as it
always does.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I promise not to let all your efforts go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And I'll do my best to make you smile. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek grins cheekily. It looks like she's
back to her usual self.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I can't seem to think of anything.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Despite the fact that you're always so considerate
of me...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I just can't read what's on your mind.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That kinda makes me feel sad, actually...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek is feeling down. It looks like her
spirits could still use some lifting...
